day.description: Day of the DST config should be a value as follows: 1: Monday; 2: Tuesday; 3: Wednesday; 4: Thursday; 5: Friday; 6: Saturday; 7: Sunday.

hour.description: Hour of the DST config should be within the range of 0-23.

minute.description: Minute of the DST config should be within the range of 0-59.

month.description: Month of the DST config should be a value as follows: 1: January; 2: February; 3: March; 4: April; 5: May; 6: June; 7: July; 8: August; 9: September; 10: October; 11: November; 12: December.

serial.description: Week of the DST config should be a value as follows: 1: 1st; 2: 2nd; 3: 3rd; 4: 4th; 5: Last.
